chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-583 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA-12974/2016 28.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Aleem Arain, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Manzoor Ali o/b of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Syed Hadi Bux Shah o/b of SHO P.S Market Respondents No.4 & 6 present in person. = The instant application No.MA-12974 of 2016 is disposed of by consent in the following terms:- The alleged contemnor No.2-Abdul Rauf, who is also respondent No.4 in the main petition is in attendance and submits that the dispute with regard to their ancestral property, in which the petitioner and other respondents are residing. The main grievance of the petitioner is that the private respondents have blocked the common staircase leading to petitioner’s portion in the property. Respondent No.4-Abdul Rauf while denying the contention of the petitioner, undertakes that petitioner will be allowed to use staircase like another lawful occupant of the property. All the parties, petitioner and respondents, are directed to conduct themselves in a civilized manner and should not create problems for each other and it is expected that in future they will facilitate/accommodate each other being part of the same family. JUDGE Shahid
